steps.t: Ecthel can be found near the entrance of Morlad in north-western Blackroot Vale. Malthellam has asked you to speak to the remaining guards of Morlad i…

Landiach can be found outside Lord Duinhir's home at the peak of Morlad. Malthellam has asked you to speak to the remaining guards of Morlad in hopes …
Malthellam can be found near the entrance of Morlad, outside his home. You have spoken to the guards of Morlad, and should now return to Malthellam.
